accurate.why: All claims accurately reflect the bill text and findings, including the War Powers Resolution context and Operation Epic Fury details.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; all statements track the bill's findings and operative provisions.

states_purpose.why: Clearly states the bill directs removal of U.S. Armed Forces from unauthorized hostilities against Iran.

changes_to_existing_law.why: References the War Powers Resolution and expedited procedures under existing law that the resolution invokes.

exceptions_conditions.why: Accurately describes the rule-of-construction carve-outs for self-defense, intelligence sharing, and defensive assistance to Israel and partners.

effective_dates.why: The bill specifies no effective dates or sunsets to report.

major_provisions_covered.why: Captures the core directive and all three exceptions, faithfully representing the bill's operative effect.

objective_tone.why: Neutral and factual, attributing characterizations to the findings without editorializing.

coherent.why: Well-organized and internally consistent across purpose, findings, and exceptions.

concise.why: Appropriately compact without padding or repetition.

correct_entities.why: Correctly identifies the President, Congress, Iran, Israel, and the War Powers Resolution.

correct_figures.why: The only date stated (February 28, 2026) matches the bill; no figures are misstated.
